content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/src/lib/auth.ts:1	import { PrismaAdapter } from "@next-auth/prisma-adapter";2	import { NextAuthOptions } from "next-auth";3	import CredentialsProvider from "next-auth/providers/credentials";4	import { prisma } from "./prisma";5	import bcrypt from "bcryptjs";6	7	export const authOptions: NextAuthOptions = {8	  adapter: PrismaAdapter(prisma),9	  session: {10	    strategy: "jwt",11	  },12	  pages: {13	    signIn: "/login",14	  },15	  providers: [16	    CredentialsProvider({17	      name: "Credentials",18	      credentials: {19	        email: { label: "Email", type: "email" },20	        password: { label: "Password", type: "password" },21	      },22	      async authorize(credentials) {23	        if (!credentials?.email || !credentials?.password) {24	          return null;25	        }26	27	        const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({28	          where: { email: credentials.email },29	        });30	31	        if (!user || !user.password) {32	          return null;33	        }34	35	        const isValid = await bcrypt.compare(credentials.password, user.password);36	37	        if (!isValid) {38	          return null;39	        }40	41	        return {42	          id: user.id,43	          email: user.email,44	          name: user.name,45	          role: user.role,46	        };47	      },48	    }),49	  ],50	  callbacks: {51	    async jwt({ token, user }) {52	      if (user) {53	        token.role = (user as any).role;54	      }55	      return token;56	    },57	    async session({ session, token }) {58	      if (session.user) {59	        (session.user as any).role = token.role;60	      }61	      return session;62	    },63	  },64	};
